meta.title: Divert: Solar (Variable Vrms) (default)
description: Divert: Solar (Variable Vrms) (default) replays a solar feed with variable measured voltage, useful for checking watts-to-current conversion.
Default divert settings balance using surplus quickly with avoiding excessive import/export swings.
This variant is driven from solar input, so the main comparison is available charge power versus actual EV charge power.
Voltage varies during the run, so apparent power and available current conversion are part of what this scenario is exercising.
